kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: The chromedriver version (146.0.7680.165) detected in PATH at C:\bin\chromedriver.exe might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (147.0.7727.102); currently, chromedriver 147.0.7727.57 is recommended for chrome 147.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: The chromedriver version (146.0.7680.165) detected in PATH at C:\bin\chromedriver.exe might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (147.0.7727.102); currently, chromedriver 147.0.7727.57 is recommended for chrome 147.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Attribute Value Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies element identified by ``locator`` contains expected attribute value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Attribute Value Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies element identified by ``locator`` contains expected attribute value.

test.name: CP03: Iniciar sesión con campos en blanco

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: The chromedriver version (146.0.7680.165) detected in PATH at C:\bin\chromedriver.exe might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (147.0.7727.102); currently, chromedriver 147.0.7727.57 is recommended for chrome 147.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.msg: Text 'Todos los campos deben ser llenados' did not appear in 5 seconds.
kw.arg: Todos los campos deben ser llenados
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Text 'Todos los campos deben ser llenados' did not appear in 5 seconds.

test.status: Text 'Todos los campos deben ser llenados' did not appear in 5 seconds.
